Body.Content:
Copilot supports document editing in Word through chat-based interactions with Agent Mode. Users can initiate edits, share clarifying directions, and review a summary of changes within the document.

GA date: November CY2025

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Agent Mode in Word for Enhanced document editing
